name: I have a concussion from a falling machine part—how do I prove long-term damage?

mainEntity.name: I have a concussion from a falling machine part—how do I prove long-term damage?

acceptedAnswer.text: Proving long-term brain injury requires specialized testing from neurologists and neuropsychologists. You must document cognitive symptoms and have a medical expert link them to the workplace incident to secure coverage for ongoing care and disability.
